d: Valen selects a tile and launches [[7]] Swift Strikes at the selected tile and its adjacent tiles. Each strike deals [[70%]]<ATK> damage to all targets. Valen is [[invincible]] while striking. After striking, Valen gains Invigoration for [[12]]s, increasing his ATK by [[20%]].

Valen strikes the target 3 times. Each strike deals [[100%]]<ATK> damage. During Invigoration, Valen generates forked lightning with each strike, dealing equal damage to the target and up to 2 nearby enemies within 2 tiles.
Valen casts his lightning strike only when he gains Invigoration, dealing [[190%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within 2 tiles.
Valen gains permanent Invigoration. When casting Thunder Swordwork during Invigoration, he permanently gains [[10%]] ATK bonus, up to [[10]] stacks.
Increases each stack of ATK bonus to [[12%]].
Triggers a lightning strike during a normal attack after gaining Invigoration, dealing equal amount of normal attack damage to an enemy within 2 tiles.
Increases each stack of ATK bonus to [[13%]].
Valen inflicts a [[3]]s stun with his Fury Thunder Strike.
